item_definitions.name: Bedroll
item_definitions.description: A waxed blanket and compact bedding for rough camps.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Bulky but easy to lash to a pack.

item_definitions.name: Flint and Steel
item_definitions.description: A reliable fire-lighting kit kept in an oiled pouch.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Useful for campfires and cautious delving.

item_definitions.name: Coil of Rope
item_definitions.description: Thirty feet of serviceable hemp rope.

item_definitions.name: Travel-Worn Blade
item_definitions.description: A practical close-combat weapon with no rules-specific statistics.

item_definitions.name: Travel Armor
item_definitions.description: Layered protection suited to long journeys and cautious delving.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Keeps mobility better than heavier harness.

item_definitions.name: Fine Tool Roll
item_definitions.description: Small picks, probes, wedges, wire, and chalk.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Useful for locks, seams, and small mechanisms.

item_definitions.name: Fieldcraft Kit
item_definitions.description: Cord, wax, needles, marking cloth, and repair pieces.

item_definitions.name: Weatherproof Journal
item_definitions.description: A bound notebook with charcoal, ink, and folded reference sheets.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Pairs naturally with the diary and note-taking loop.

item_definitions.name: Ritual Kit
item_definitions.description: Incense, clean thread, chalk, bells, and empty petition slips.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Supports rites, vows, and cleansing work.

item_definitions.name: Sealed Occult Case
item_definitions.description: A warded case for samples, rubbings, and unsettling evidence.

item_definitions.name: Contract Tokens
item_definitions.description: Marked counters used to record employers, debts, and obligations.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Useful for promises, debts, and leverage.

item_definitions.name: Mapping Kit
item_definitions.description: Measuring cord, charcoal, parchment scraps, and a compass.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Supports route planning and survey notes.

item_definitions.name: Travel Instrument
item_definitions.description: A compact instrument suitable for performance and signaling.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Useful in performance, morale, and signals.

item_definitions.name: Meditation Tokens
item_definitions.description: Smooth marked stones used for memory, focus, and interpretation.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Useful for focus and ritual recollection.

item_definitions.name: Weathered Shield
item_definitions.description: A sturdy shield with space for paint, nails, or travel scars.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Can be readied in the off hand or stowed on the back.

item_definitions.name: Ashwood Spear
item_definitions.description: A practical spear suited to guarding narrow ground or traveling trails.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Two-handed by default; long enough to stow on the back.

item_definitions.name: Wayfarer Backpack
item_definitions.description: A travel backpack with straps, loops, and room for expedition gear.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: Provides a place to stow smaller carried items.

item_definitions.name: Padded Hood
item_definitions.description: A quilted hood that softens glare, rain, and minor scrapes.
item_definitions.placeholder_special_rules: A simple protective layer for rough weather.
